Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
No Appearsnce by plaintiff/opposing party
(Via Court Call) Lila Y Almarhoo, Esq. of McGuire Woods (310-315-8200), attorney for defendant/moving party

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. General demurrer per CCP 430.10(d) is overruled. Successive owner is not a necessary party to the action for breach of contract/tort arising during prior ownership. Special Demurer is sustained with leave to amend to comply with CRC 2.112 and to address the ambiguity in paragraph 10. Moving party and its counsel is ordered again (See CGC-13-529041 June 21, 2013 minute order; CGC-12-523629 July 21, 2013 minute order; CGC-12-527295 May 21, 2014 minute order) to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. Any future failure to comply with SFLR 2.6B or C will result in the matter being taken off calendar. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501)
